settings.heading: What does my friend need to do before we both get $10?
settings.content: Your friend will get $10 to shop with Berkeley Life once you send them your referral link. After they order using the unique discount code from your referral, you'll receive your $10 reward 30 days later.

settings.heading: How many friends can I refer?
settings.content: You can refer an unlimited number of friends. Share the benefits of better blood flow and nitric oxide support with as many people as you like.

settings.heading: What does my friend need to do before we both get $10?
settings.content: Your friend will receive $10 to shop with Berkeley Life once you send them your referral link. After they place their order using the unique discount code from your referral, you’ll receive your $10 reward 30 days later

settings.heading: When will I receive my $10 reward?
settings.content: You will receive your $10 reward 30 days after your referred friend completes their qualifying purchase using your unique referral discount code.

settings.heading: What products are eligible for the referral discount?
settings.content: All Berkeley Life products are eligible for the referral discount when purchased using a valid referral discount code.

settings.heading: Can I refer someone who has purchased Berkeley Life before?
settings.content: The referral program is for new customers only. The person you refer must be a first-time purchaser of Berkeley Life products.

settings.heading: What happens if my friend returns their order?
settings.content: Our return window for new customers is 30 days. If your friend returns their order, you will not receive your $10 reward.

settings.heading: I have a different question.
settings.content: If you have a question that hasn’t been answered here, please contact our customer support team via https://berkeleylife.com/pages/contact We’re happy to help.
